title: leucanthemum segetum
intro: Leucanthemum segetum, also known as the oxeye daisy, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemum segetum are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
